name: 测试与迭代
subject: science
domain_name: 工程设计 / Engineering Design / Engineering Design
curriculum_points: K-2-ETS1-3: Analyze data from tests of two objects designed to solve the same problem to compare the strengths and weaknesses of how each performs.
3-5-ETS1-3: Plan and carry out fair tests in which variables are controlled and failure points are considered to identify aspects of a model or prototype that can be improved.
